name: Minor Tomfoolery
description:
Images are not mine, and all are 18+

So for this ENTIRE scenario to work, I had to make it eNVy, because that's where this picture comes from.

Scenario:

N and V are meeting their past selves, and V asks her future self, obviously, if they get N in the near future. Of course, V being the cat-coded DD she is, doesn't sugarcoat it, and her past self faints, leaving both N's gobsmacked
creator: Showman682
